---
title: "People"
pagetitle: "People & Advisees — Arvind Karunakaran"
description: "Doctoral and master's students advised by Arvind Karunakaran at Stanford University."
---

I advise doctoral and master's students working at the intersection of
organizations, technology, and work. Prospective students should review my
[research](research.qmd) before reaching out.

## Doctoral Advisees

[Dissertation Advisor]{.eyebrow}

::: {.stack-list}
- **Noah Benjamin-Pollak**
- **Devesh Narayanan**
- **Brian Lattimore**
:::

[Dissertation Reader]{.eyebrow}

::: {.stack-list}
- **Emma Casey**
- **Allie Cemalovic**
:::

## Master's Advisees

::: {.stack-list}
- Eamon Aalipour
- Sambhav Aggarwal
- Shikoh Hirabayashi
- Sanjana Khurana
- Jackie King
- Grace Metri
- Merve Ondogan
- Armin Rezaiean-Asel
- Jesus Santos Aranda
- Emna Sellami
- Jiecong Tan
- Aaron Thompson
:::
